To: Board Compliance Committee; From: Office of the General Counsel, Pinewave Health Bancorp, Inc. (US); Date: June 1, 2026.
Subject: Reg FD, Rule 10b-5, and privacy patchwork (CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA) — precision guidance for upcoming quarter-end communications.
As a US issuer with healthcare and banking operations, avoid selective disclosure to analysts or investors; use only materials previously filed with the SEC and posted on our website.
The “Crypto in Employee Benefits” webinar is educational; it references product names only and does not involve tokens, trading, or any securities offering.
ESG/climate marketing one-pagers summarize already-announced sustainability metrics; they do not include new commercial terms or forward-looking financial impacts.
The Q2 cyber incident tabletop exercise is a simulation for training; it does not reflect any live events and may be shared internally for awareness.
Insider-list and information-barrier procedures: continue using template FIN-IL-03; do not add patient, household, or customer data fields; retain role-based access logs.
Standard blackout periods for the employee equity plan remain as posted; send questions to compliance@pinewave.example or ir@pinewave.example.
Analyst teach-in sessions must rely on the last 10-Q deck; route unscripted questions to the IR role mailbox; no one-on-one guidance beyond public disclosures.
Internal note: a potential cyber intrusion at Redwood Telehealth LLC (wholly owned) is under forensic review; until Form 8-K timing is determined, maintain an information-barrier and update insider-list PW-IL-2026-06 with access roles only.
Draft ESG-linked pricing terms in a proposed data-hosting services agreement with Northlake Therapeutics are preliminary and not for external distribution beyond the negotiating team.
The “tipping” and “insider trading” case studies in the LMS are fictional; they are designed for policy education and do not reflect current transactions or issuers.
The “CareCoin” crypto wallet pilot is a patient engagement points program, not a digital asset or a security; no transfers, trades, or off-platform wallets are supported.
GLBA/HIPAA: do not circulate sample account numbers (e.g., ACCT-0000-TEST) or masked patient IDs outside training materials; privacy@pinewave.example can provide sanitized examples.
For public inquiries, direct callers to our published helpline 000-000-0000; do not provide non-public risk assessments, commercial-term drafts, or incident timelines.
Supervisory references: SEC Reg FD and Rule 10b-5, OCC and FFIEC guidance for cyber notifications; coordinate any external contact through the Legal and IR role mailboxes.
